calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Respondent/Plaintiff Juan Carlos Medina did not appear.
Joanna Kozubal, Esq., appeared on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Golden Gate Tow.
Defendant Imperial Parking Industries, Inc. did not appear.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Parties and witness for Golden Gate Tow Marco Aure sworn.


Joanna Kozubal testified on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Golden Gate Tow.
Marco Aure testified on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Golden Gate Tow.

Plaintiff's exhibits are in the file and are retained by the Court.
Defendant's exhibits retained by the Court.

The matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Robert Aune; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
